puzzleDescription: The final test for Switch Statements! Convert a letter grade (A, B, C, F) into a performance description.
objective: Input a grade (A, B, C, or F). Print 'Excellent' for A, 'Good' for B, 'Average' for C, and 'Fail' for F. For any other character, print 'Invalid Grade'.
hints: Remember to use single quotes for char cases: case 'A':
Include a 'default:' case to handle 'Invalid Grade' for letters not in the list.
Don't forget the 'break;' after each description!
